features.name: Home Step Counter
features.description: Add a step counter to the Home page that increments with a +1 button and resets to zero with a Reset button.
features.evidence: docs/harness/specs/home-counter/ defines the reviewable spec, ui-map delta, and Maestro-only UI acceptance checklist; .maestro/android and .maestro/ios contain the executable home_counter_flow; lib/features/home/presentation/bloc contains HomeCounterBloc event/state logic with 100% test coverage; lib/features/home/presentation/pages/home_page.dart renders the BLoC state with Semantics identifiers; fvm flutter test test/features/home/presentation/bloc/home_counter_bloc_test.dart passes; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check passes with all logic/data/BLoC/network/harness tests; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart spec accept home-counter --maestro --platform all reports PASS on iOS and Android; docs/harness/evidence/home-counter/report.json, report-ios.json, and report-android.json are committed evidence.

features.name: Home Counter Decrement
features.description: Add a -1 button to the Home step counter that decrements the count by one, never going below zero.
features.evidence: docs/harness/specs/home-counter-decrement/ defines spec, acceptance.yaml, and ui-map delta; .maestro/android and .maestro/ios contain the executable home_counter_decrement_flow; lib/features/home/presentation/bloc/home_counter_bloc.dart handles DecrementHomeCounter with zero-floor guard; lib/features/home/presentation/pages/home_page.dart renders the -1 button with Semantics identifier; test/features/home/presentation/bloc/home_counter_bloc_test.dart passes with 3 new decrement tests; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check passes; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart spec accept home-counter-decrement --maestro --platform all reports PASS on iOS and Android; docs/harness/evidence/home-counter-decrement/report.json, report-ios.json, and report-android.json are committed evidence.

features.name: Home User Display
features.description: 在 Home 页面步数计数器上方加载并展示 user1 (John Doe) 的用户信息卡片，包含头像、姓名、邮箱。复用已有 GetUserUseCase，不新建数据层。
features.evidence: docs/harness/specs/home-user-display/ 定义 spec (6 条验收标准)、acceptance.yaml、ui-map.delta.yaml (5 个新 UI targets); .maestro/ios 和 .maestro/android 包含可执行的 home_user_display_flow; lib/features/home/presentation/bloc/home_user_bloc.dart 通过 GetUserUseCase 构造函数注入加载用户, home_user_event.dart 定义 LoadHomeUser 事件, home_user_state.dart 定义 HomeUserInitial/Loading/Loaded/Error 四种状态; lib/features/home/presentation/pages/home_page.dart 重构为 MultiBlocProvider, _HomeUserSection 展示头像/姓名/邮箱, _HomeCounterSection 保持计数器功能; test/features/home/presentation/bloc/home_user_bloc_test.dart 6 个测试全部通过 (initial/loaded/generic error/ApiException/userId/multi-event); fvm dart run tool/harness.dart check 通过; fvm dart run tool/harness.dart spec accept home-user-display --maestro --platform all 报告 iOS 和 Android 双端 PASS (6/6 criteria); docs/harness/evidence/home-user-display/report.json、report-ios.json、report-android.json 已提交为验收证据。
